ROUTE.name: development
ROUTE.PRIMING_CONTEXT: keywords: "development, code, coding, bug, fix, performance, improve, routing, capability-routing" hint: "This route receives USER_INTENT and is the sole decision point: whether to execute the task, how (e.g. delegate via RUN_AGENT_TASK), or decline. Logic for writing code, fixing bugs, improving performance, etc."
ROUTE.PLAN_FORMAT: General structure of the plan file (not strict; adapt to the task): - plan — root; id and session_env_id optional. - role — which role to use (path to .ai/framework/roles/… or role name). - goal — short description of what to achieve. - context — user_intent, project, constraints, anything that helps the agent. - steps — ordered list of steps (step with order or free-form); each step is a clear, actionable item. Order and nesting may vary; machine-readable.
